note: DRT open data only publishes real per-station ridership for Airport Rail Link (ARL, 8 stations). BTS/MRT/SRT/Red Line/Yellow Line/Pink Line are only published as monthly line-level totals by operator (no station breakdown exists in this catalog as of 2026-07-05).

แอร์พอร์ต เรล ลิงก์ (ARL).stations_note: per-station figures = sum of daily Passenger_Departure for the month; differs slightly (~1%) from the official line total above because it comes from a separate DRT resource (drt2566_02.csv) than the line-level monthly totals (drt1_2569_06.csv).
